entries.text:
Verse 1

the LORD (Hebrew. Jehovah) said. See note on Exodus 3:7, and compare note on Exodus 6:10.

afterwards. Some codices, with Septuagint, Syriac, and Vulgate, read "and after".

Verse 2

man. Hebrew "ish (App-14.

borrow = ask. See note on Exodus 3:22.

jewels: or articles, or vessels.

Verse 7

dog, &c. Figure of speech Parcemia (App-6).

Verse 10

This verse is Figure of speech Prolepsis, App-6, as the acts were not done till later.
